findings.title: VAT fabricated on exempt/zero-rated lines (deriveTax) — over-declared to KRA + diverged from persisted receipt
KRA 2xx acceptance trusted blindly — blank control-unit/CU-invoice/QR persisted as 'accepted'
Sequence allocation read-then-insert, no lock — orphaned/duplicate KRA invoice on collision
No unitPrice*qty==lineTotal consistency check before KRA registration
Live writer dead code on real sale path (writeReceipt always Local) — see S03
